member.name: P:Nomad.Save.Private.Entities.SaveSectionWriter.Name
member.summary: This section's name.

member.name: P:Nomad.Save.Private.Entities.SaveSectionWriter.FieldCount
member.summary: The number of fields in this section.

member.name: M:Nomad.Save.Private.Repositories.SlotRepository.AddSaveFile(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Checks the save slot cache to see if we already have the slot indexed, if not, it's added.

member.name: T:Nomad.Save.Private.Services.BackupService
member.remarks: Every time a new save file is written to, a backup is created of that save file. Which is just a save file with extra header information marking how old it is, what API version it was saved to, and what order it is in the backup chain. If the maximum number of backups is reached when creating a new backup, the oldest backup is deleted.

member.name: M:Nomad.Save.Private.Services.SaveDataProvider.#ctor(Nomad.Core.Engine.Services.IEngineService,Nomad.Core.Events.IGameEventRegistryService,Nomad.Core.CVars.ICVarSystemService,Nomad.Core.FileSystem.IFileSystem,Nomad.Core.Logger.ILoggerService)
member.summary: Creates a new SaveDataProvider object.

member.name: M:Nomad.Save.Private.Services.SaveWriterService.AddSection(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new section with the id of and returns it.
member.param: The name of the section to add.
member.exception: Thrown if already exists in the section cache.

member.name: P:Nomad.Save.Private.ValueObjects.BackupData.Version
member.summary: The API version we used when creating the backup.

member.name: P:Nomad.Save.Private.ValueObjects.BackupData.Guid
member.summary: The Id of the save file we're backing up.

member.name: P:Nomad.Save.Private.ValueObjects.BackupData.CreatedAt
member.summary: When the backup was created.

member.name: P:Nomad.Save.Private.ValueObjects.BackupData.Number
member.summary: The backup's index in the chain.

member.name: M:Nomad.Save.Private.ValueObjects.SaveField.Read(System.String,System.Int32,Nomad.Core.FileSystem.Streams.IMemoryReadStream)
member.summary: Loads a SaveField object into memory from a save file stream.
member.param: The section the field is bound to.
The index of the field.
The file stream to read from.
member.exception: Thrown if the field's data is invalid.

member.name: T:Nomad.Save.Private.ValueObjects.SectionHeader
member.summary: Represents a save section's header containing the metadata.

member.name: F:Nomad.Save.Private.ValueObjects.SectionHeader.Name
member.summary: The section's name.

member.name: F:Nomad.Save.Private.ValueObjects.SectionHeader.Checksum
member.summary: The section's CRC64.

member.name: F:Nomad.Save.Private.ValueObjects.SectionHeader.FieldCount
member.summary: The amount of written values in the section.

member.name: F:Nomad.Save.Private.ValueObjects.SectionHeader.ByteLength
member.summary: The total length of the section, used for corruption checking.

member.summary: Event that triggers when is called.

member.summary: Adds a new field with the data and .
member.remarks: If a similar field was added to this with the same name and type, a exception will be thrown.
member.param: The field's unique id.
The field's value. Must be a valid to avoid an

member.name: T:Nomad.Save.Interfaces.ISaveWriterService
member.summary: A service for writing persistent game/save data to disk.
member.example: Here is an example of how you would utilize this to write some (for example) player data to a save file:

member.name: M:Nomad.Save.Interfaces.ISaveWriterService.AddSection(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new section with the id of and returns it.
member.param: The name of the section to add.
member.exception: Thrown if already exists in the section cache.

member.name: T:Nomad.Save.Services.ISaveDataProvider
member.summary: The interface contract to interacting with the save system module. Handles loading, saving, and general management of persistent game state.
member.remarks:
This is meant to be multithreaded, so make sure you are taking the proper precautions around state management and loading the data from disk.
NOTE: this is v1.0.0, expect changes in the future as the framework matures.

member.name: M:Nomad.Save.Services.ISaveDataProvider.Save(System.String,Nomad.Save.ValueObjects.GameVersion)
member.summary: Writes the current game state to the provided save file given by to disk.
member.remarks: Executes on a dedicated worker thread to ensure zero blockage of the UI. However also ensure that when you write the data to the disk that you are locking your persistent data as to not cause a dirty read.
member.param: The file to write the persistent game state to.

member.name: M:Nomad.Save.Services.ISaveDataProvider.Load(System.String)
member.summary: Reads a save file and loads the information into memory to be then read and processed as the new state. This save file is provided through .
member.remarks: Executes on a dedicated worker thread to ensure zero blockage of the UI so that you can put something like a loading screen for the wait down. Ensure that you are properly locking persistent variables to ensure you aren't getting race conditions or doing unsafe things with threads.
member.param: The file to read the persistent game data from.

member.name: M:Nomad.Save.Services.ISaveDataProvider.ListSaveFiles
member.summary: Returns a list of all the currently available save data files in the save system.
member.returns: The complete list of save files found in the save system's data path.

member.name: T:Nomad.Save.ValueObjects.GameVersion
member.summary: Represents the serialized game version in integer format. This only supports a Major, Minor, and Patch version, all 32-bit unsigned integers.
member.remarks: The first two bits are for the major version, next 3 bits are the minor, the rest is dedicated to the patch number.

member.name: M:Nomad.Save.ValueObjects.GameVersion.Serialize(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.Streams.IWriteStream)
member.summary: Writes the GameVersion to disk.

member.name: M:Nomad.Save.ValueObjects.GameVersion.Deserialize(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.Streams.IReadStream)
member.summary: Reads the GameVersion from disk.

member.name: T:Nomad.Save.ValueObjects.SaveFileMetadata
member.summary: The metadata of a persistent game state file. Stores relevant information for debugging, listing, and/or sorting.
member.remarks: Retrieving the metadata for all the save files currently available can be done with .
member.param: The save file's name. This is not the actual name, just the user-provided identification.
The size of the save file in bytes.
The year the save file was last accessed.
The month the save file was last accessed.
The day the save file was last accessed.

member.name: M:Nomad.Save.ValueObjects.SaveFileMetadata.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: The metadata of a persistent game state file. Stores relevant information for debugging, listing, and/or sorting.
member.remarks: Retrieving the metadata for all the save files currently available can be done with .
member.param: The save file's name. This is not the actual name, just the user-provided identification.
The size of the save file in bytes.
The year the save file was last accessed.
The month the save file was last accessed.
The day the save file was last accessed.

member.name: P:Nomad.Save.ValueObjects.SaveFileMetadata.SaveName
member.summary: The save file's name. This is not the actual name, just the user-provided identification.

member.name: P:Nomad.Save.ValueObjects.SaveFileMetadata.FileSize
member.summary: The size of the save file in bytes.

member.name: P:Nomad.Save.ValueObjects.SaveFileMetadata.LastAccessYear
member.summary: The year the save file was last accessed.

member.name: P:Nomad.Save.ValueObjects.SaveFileMetadata.LastAccessMonth
member.summary: The month the save file was last accessed.

member.name: P:Nomad.Save.ValueObjects.SaveFileMetadata.LastAccessDay
member.summary: The day the save file was last accessed.

member.summary: Writes the version data to a .
member.param: The stream to write to.
